name: Frosted Date Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat shortening and sugar together until creamy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Blend in vanilla.
4. Sift together flour, baking powder, soda, salt, and spices.
5. Add to the creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk; blend well.
6. Stir in nutmeats, dates, and oats.
7. Pour into a well-greased and floured 1-1/2 quart ring mold.
8. Bake in a preheated slow oven (325°F) for 45 to 50 minutes.
9. Loosen edges; cool on a wire rack about 15 minutes.
10. Remove from the mold; cool.
Frost with orange buttercream frosting. Decorate with red and green candied cherries.
